description_long: This is a large, rectangular shipping container with a predominantly black exterior. The container features vertical metal bars on its shorter ends, likely serving as reinforcement or security for the doors. One of the longer sides displays two distinct access panels: a horizontal wooden crate secured with straps and a smaller, orange-toned wooden section, suggesting areas for inspection or access. The surface of the container is slightly uneven, with visible ridges and subtle wear, indicating heavy-duty use. There are faint greenish markings or text on the top and sides, though they are not clearly legible. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for secure storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, black, rectangular shipping container with metal bars on the ends and wooden access panels on one side, showing signs of heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: End view showing vertical metal bars across the face, with a slightly ridged top surface visible.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly featureless black surface, only subtle surface texture and ridges are visible.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, with vertical metal bars and a slightly uneven top.
description_view_3: Side view featuring two wooden access panels—one large and horizontal, one smaller and vertical—set into the black container wall.
attribute_lid_type: double swinging doors with vertical locking bars
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faint green markings or text on top and sides, not clearly legible
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars on doors, no traditional handles
